title: Vidya
writer: Y.N. Joshi, Munshi Ratanlal Khanjar, P.L. Santoshi
plot: Born in a low-caste family of chamars (cobblers), Chandu alias Chandrashekhar (Dev Anand) helps his father repair shoes and other footware for a small pittance. One day a girl from a rich and wealthy family, Vidya (Suraiya) stops ...
